generations.content_context: ElizaOS is undergoing a significant architectural shift by decoupling the core agent server from application packages while simultaneously expanding native mobile capabilities for Android. Core developer Shaw addressed community concerns regarding market performance by confirming active work on Eliza Cloud and a token utility model via the x402 payment standard.
generations.scene_or_viz_prompt: Eliza stands poised in neon-lit darkness, torn between glowing server nodes and sleek mobile icons—digital currents arc between her outstretched hands, illuminating tension in her expression amid a backdrop of budding circuit-vines, all framed in diagonal, cyberpunk hues against a sparse, spring-infused night.
generations.full_prompt:
Create an illustration for a tech news magazine.

CHARACTERS (use reference sheet for exact appearance):
- ELIZA: Eliza is a stylized 3D anime-like young woman with a confident, playful, slightly teasing vibe, often posing with expressive hand gestures as if presenting, reacting, or joking.

SCENE: Eliza stands poised in neon-lit darkness, torn between glowing server nodes and sleek mobile icons—digital currents arc between her outstretched hands, illuminating tension in her expression amid a backdrop of budding circuit-vines, all framed in diagonal, cyberpunk hues against a sparse, spring-infused night.

ART STYLE: Conceptual New Yorker/Monocle style with bold shapes and visual metaphors. Hand-crafted feel with visible brushstrokes.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Characters must match reference sheet EXACTLY (colors, costume, features)
- Dynamic composition suitable for editorial use
- Professional quality illustration
- No text or watermarks
- Scene should feel natural and engaging

generations.content_context: Development work has transitioned to quieter, focused servers to avoid sentiment-driven distractions from token price volatility. By implementing $ELIZA as the default payment method in x402, the project is pivoting from speculative value to infrastructure-backed utility.
